osx.command: ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt --target .python_packages/lib/site-packages

windows.command: ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt --target .python_packages/lib/site-packages

linux.command: ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && ${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt --target .python_packages/lib/site-packages
